languages.text: "То есть наказания за тяжкий проступок этот слуга не понесет? Удивительно, как при таком беспечном подходе к власти вы до сих пор удерживаете главенство, наследни{mf|к|ца}".
"So, this servant will suffer no punishment for his grave transgression? With such a careless approach to authority, it is astonishing that you still retain mastery over this dynasty, my heir."
languages.original_text: "То есть наказания за тяжкий проступок этот слуга не понесет? Удивительно, как при таком беспечном подходе к власти вы до сих пор удерживаете главенство, наследни{mf|к|ца}".

traits.locale_text: "So this servant will suffer no punishment for his grave transgression? It is astonishing that with such a careless approach to authority, you still retain mastery over this dynasty, heir."
"So, this servant will suffer no punishment for his grave transgression? With such a careless approach to authority, it is astonishing that you still retain mastery over this dynasty, heir."
"So, this servant will suffer no punishment for his grave transgression? With such a careless approach to authority, it is astonishing that you still retain mastery over this dynasty, heir."
"So, this servant will suffer no punishment for his grave transgression? With such a careless approach to authority, it is astonishing that you still retain mastery over this dynasty, my heir."

languages.text: «¿No piensa administrar a este siervo el castigo que merece por tan grave infracción? Me asombra que una noción tan descuidada de su autoridad le haya permitido mantener el control de esta dinastía, {mf|heredero|heredera}».
languages.original_text: "So, this servant will suffer no punishment for his grave transgression? With such a careless approach to authority, it is astonishing that you still retain mastery over this dynasty, my heir."

traits.locale_text: «¿No piensa administrar a este siervo el castigo que merece por tan grave infracción? Me asombra que una noción tan descuidada de su autoridad le haya permitido mantener el control de esta dinastía, {mf|heredero|heredera}».

languages.text: “这么说，这仆从犯下如此严重的僭越之罪，竟不用受半点惩罚？你对待权威如此草率，居然还能继续执掌这个王朝，真是令人惊讶，我的继承人。”
languages.original_text: "So, this servant will suffer no punishment for his grave transgression? With such a careless approach to authority, it is astonishing that you still retain mastery over this dynasty, my heir."

traits.locale_text: “这么说，这仆从犯下如此严重的僭越之罪，竟不用受半点惩罚？你对待权威如此草率，居然还能继续执掌这个王朝，真是令人惊讶，我的继承人。”

languages.text: « Or donc, ce serviteur ne sera pas puni pour sa transgression, si grave soit-elle ? Je m'étonne que vous ayez réussi à conserver les rênes de la dynastie avec une approche aussi négligente de l'autorité, {mf|héritier|héritière}. »
languages.original_text: "So, this servant will suffer no punishment for his grave transgression? With such a careless approach to authority, it is astonishing that you still retain mastery over this dynasty, my heir."

traits.locale_text: « Or donc, ce serviteur ne sera pas puni pour sa transgression, si grave soit-elle ? Je m'étonne que vous ayez réussi à conserver les rênes de la dynastie avec une approche aussi négligente de l'autorité, {mf|héritier|héritière}. »

languages.text: "Yani bu hizmetkâr işlediği ciddi suçtan dolayı hiçbir ceza çekmeyecek mi? Otoriteye bu kadar dikkatsiz bir yaklaşımla, bu hanedanlık üzerindeki hâkimiyetini hâlâ koruyor olman hayret verici vârisim."
languages.original_text: "So, this servant will suffer no punishment for his grave transgression? With such a careless approach to authority, it is astonishing that you still retain mastery over this dynasty, my heir."

traits.locale_text: "Yani bu hizmetkâr işlediği ciddi suçtan dolayı hiçbir ceza çekmeyecek mi? Otoriteye bu kadar dikkatsiz bir yaklaşımla, bu hanedanlık üzerindeki hâkimiyetini hâlâ koruyor olman hayret verici vârisim."

languages.text: 「つまり、この重罪を犯した侍は罰を受けないのですか。権力に対するこのような軽率な態度で、あなたは未だにこの王朝を統治しているのですか、私の後継者。」
languages.original_text: "So, this servant will suffer no punishment for his grave transgression? With such a careless approach to authority, it is astonishing that you still retain mastery over this dynasty, my heir."

traits.locale_text: 「つまり、この重罪を犯した侍は罰を受けないのですか。権力に対するこのような軽率な態度で、あなたは未だにこの王朝を統治しているのですか、私の後継者。」

languages.text: "Dieser Diener wird für dieses schwere Vergehen also nicht bestraft? Es ist erstaunlich, dass Ihr trotz Eures sorglosen Umgangs mit Autorität immer noch über diese Dynastie herrscht, {mf|werter Erbe|werte Erbin}."
languages.original_text: "So, this servant will suffer no punishment for his grave transgression? With such a careless approach to authority, it is astonishing that you still retain mastery over this dynasty, my heir."

traits.locale_text: "Dieser Diener wird für dieses schwere Vergehen also nicht bestraft? Es ist erstaunlich, dass Ihr trotz Eures sorglosen Umgangs mit Autorität immer noch über diese Dynastie herrscht, {mf|werter Erbe|werte Erbin}."
